title: Usopp Chooses Courage
description: On pages 10–13, usopp chooses courage focuses on Usopp, Chew, Nami, Arlong as usopp is forced into a one-on-one fight against Chew and struggles between fear, lies, and real courage.
scene: On pages 10–13, usopp chooses courage focuses on Usopp, Chew, Nami, Arlong as usopp is forced into a one-on-one fight against Chew and struggles between fear, lies, and real courage.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: From the moment I took one step outside my village, I should've thrown away all notions of "peace" or "safety"...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: As if a little attack from some half fish bastard could ever hit me!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: because they risk their lives and give it their all everyday,

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: They can laugh from the bottom of their hearts like that!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: That's why I decided to go out to the seas as well!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Because I want to be able to smile and laugh like they do!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: If I don't fight seriously right now,

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: I don't have the right to sail on the same ship as them!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Certain kill!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Nor do I have the right to laugh with them!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Flame star!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: As if that'd work on me.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: It's... over.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: would've been better if you had just pretended to be dead.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But I guess you're too dumb for that.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Chu ()

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyashi villagers
dialogue.text: Damn right, it's over! Over for you, that is!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ugh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Agh!

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyashi villagers
dialogue.text: It's over...!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Chu?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: USOP?!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Hammer!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: GUH...!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: USOPP rubber band!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Flinch!

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
